texto: War is unlike life. It's a denial of everything you learn life is. And that's why when you get finished with it, you see that if offers no lessons that can't be bettered learned in civilian life. You are exposed to horrors you would sooner forget.
explicacao: Citação de Robert Graff sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “War is unlike life. It's a denial of everything you learn life is. And that's why when you get fi…” articula sabedoria, combat, war em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como war e wwii-history.
